title: Intensely Flavored Irish Fish Skewers
description: A pescatarian-friendly Irish dish featuring fish sauce and brine-dry fish, served in banana leaves, with a jammy and springy texture. This show-off dish is perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together fish sauce, brown sugar, lime juice, and olive oil.
Add the cod pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated cod pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the banana leaves with olive oil and place a skewer in the center of each leaf.
Fold the banana leaves over the skewers to form a packet and secure with toothpicks.
Grill the packets for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the fish is cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with minced garlic and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
